definition: Covenant-lite loan dominance (>90%), EBITDA addbacks (15-40% with 40-60% realization rates), and private credit opacity ($1.7T+ with mark-to-model NAVs) are structurally delaying credit cycle recognition, making true leverage ~1.5-2.0x higher than reported.
evidence: Amendment activity at 40-50% of leveraged loan universe vs. ~20-25% in 2019
Private credit NAV autocorrelation 0.5-0.7 suppresses measured volatility by 2-3x
PIK toggle usage rising (BSL: 5-8%; private credit: 12-18%)
Pre-covenant-lite breaches triggered at 5.5-6x leverage vs. current 8x+ operation without trigger
ECB and Fed analyses confirm true leverage understated
open_questions: How much does the opacity extend the lag between economic deterioration and measured credit stress?
What observable proxies can penetrate the covenant-lite opacity?
When does amendment activity transition from extend-and-pretend to forced recognition?
